command: echo  | base64 -d > /tmp/claude-poller-new.sh && chmod +x /tmp/claude-poller-new.sh && cp /home/jose/claude-poller.sh /home/jose/claude-poller.sh.bak.v1 && cp /tmp/claude-poller-new.sh /home/jose/claude-poller.sh && sudo systemctl restart claude-poller && sleep 3 && systemctl is-active claude-poller && echo POLLER_V2_DEPLOYED
